nodes.name: Every Day at 8 PM
nodes.notes: Triggers every day at 8:00 PM local time. This gives you time to finish your day before generating the review. Adjust the cron expression for your timezone if n8n runs in UTC.

nodes.name: Get Completed Tasks Today
nodes.notes: Queries the Notion Tasks database for all tasks with Status = 'Done' that were completed today. Adjust the filter if your date property name differs. Replace database ID and credential ID.

nodes.name: Get In-Progress Tasks
nodes.notes: Gets all tasks still in progress to include in the daily review as carry-over items.

nodes.name: Merge Task Data
nodes.notes: Combines completed tasks and in-progress tasks into a single dataset for Claude to analyze.

nodes.name: Aggregate Task Summary
nodes.notes: Transforms raw Notion data into a clean summary object with completed tasks and in-progress tasks categorized by project and priority.

nodes.name: Claude - Generate Review
nodes.notes: Sends the aggregated task data to Claude for narrative daily review generation. Claude provides a human-readable summary with wins, patterns, and a reflection prompt. Replace API key.

nodes.name: Format Review
nodes.notes: Formats Claude's response into a clean title and content block for the Notion page.

nodes.name: Create Daily Review in Notion
nodes.notes: Creates a new page in the Daily Reviews database in Notion with the AI-generated review content. Replace the database ID with your Daily Reviews database ID.

parameters.body: =Your daily review for {{ $json.date }} is ready in Notion. {{ $('Aggregate Task Summary').item.json.completed_count }} tasks completed today!

nodes.name: Send Notification
nodes.notes: Sends a push notification via ntfy.sh (free, self-hostable notification service). Replace the topic with your ntfy topic. You can also swap this for Slack, Discord, email, or any other notification method.
